---
title: SvelteActionBar
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/ActionBar.svelte
format: html
---

<style>
/* Adjust the height of the title block banner */
quarto-title-banner {
height: 100px; /* Increase or decrease as needed */
}

/* Adjust the font size of the title */
#title-block-header h3 {
font-size: 1.5rem; /* Adjust font size */
}
</style>

> Reusable Svelte component with Styling

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
myActionBar = html`<my-actionbar2></my-actionbar2>`
```
